subject: Application for AI Engineer Position at SirionLabs
body: Dear Anurag Rana, I am writing to express my interest in the AI Engineer role at SirionLabs. As a developer with strong experience in AI, Machine Learning, and NLP systems, I possess relevant skills in Transformers and RAG systems. I have also authored a research paper titled 'Forensic Text Completion using Transformer-based Models: Fine-tuning and Retrieval Augmented Approach,' which will be presented at ICADCML 2026. My resume is attached for review. I am available for an interview during the upcoming weekend. Best regards, Pravesh Srivastava

subject: Application for AI Engineer Position at Talisma
body:
Dear Anurag Shrivastava,

I am writing to express my interest in the AI Engineer position at Talisma. With a strong background in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and NLP systems, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your team. My skills include Python, PyTorch, Transformers, and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. I have also authored a research paper on Forensic Text Completion using Transformer-based Models, accepted at ICADCML 2026. My resume is attached for review. I am available for an interview on Friday or Saturday at your convenience.

Best regards,
Pravesh Srivastava

subject: Application for AI Engineer Position at Uniphore
body:
Dear Anurag Verma,

I am writing to express my interest in the AI Engineer role at Uniphore. With strong experience in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and NLP systems, I am confident that my skills align with the company's requirements. My expertise includes Python, SQL, Java, C/C++, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, and more. I have also authored a research paper on Transformer-based Models and have experience with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. I have attached my resume for review. I am available for an interview during the upcoming weekend, such as Friday or Saturday, at a time convenient for you. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Pravesh Srivastava

subject: Application for AI Engineer Position at Locuz
body:
Dear Archana Manne, 
I am writing to express my interest in the AI Engineer role at Locuz. As a developer with strong experience in AI, ML, and NLP systems, I believe I would be a great fit for this position. I have expertise in Python, SQL, Java, C/C++, as well as machine learning and deep learning techniques such as supervised and unsupervised learning, feature engineering, and transformers. I have also worked with libraries like PyTorch, TensorFlow, and HuggingFace Transformers. I recently authored a research paper titled 'Forensic Text Completion using Transformer-based Models: Fine-tuning and Retrieval Augmented Approach' which has been accepted at ICADCML 2026. I have attached my resume for your review. I am available for an interview during the upcoming weekend, please let me know a convenient time. 
Best regards, 
Pravesh Srivastava
